ideation: This sequence simulates the act of using a computer mouse.  The animation will focus on the right hand, as it's the dominant hand for most mouse users. The left arm will remain in a relaxed, neutral position to provide contrast and balance. The sequence will show the right hand moving the mouse in a smooth, controlled manner.  I will reference the existing examples to ensure the range of motion and fluidity of the movement are realistic for the robot's arm structure. Frame 1 will show a neutral starting position. Frame 2 will show the right arm moving the mouse slightly to the right. Frame 3 will show the right arm moving the mouse back to the center. Frame 4 will show a slight downward movement of the mouse. Frame 5 will show the arm returning to the neutral position.

frames.beat: both arms rest, ready to click
right arm nudges the mouse to the right
right arm slides the mouse back to center
right arm moves the mouse down slightly
right arm returns to rest, click complete
